message:
test(wave-17): add 72 pure data-type tests across router, resource, event_structure, obligation_tracker

- transport/router.rs: 30 tests covering EndpointId, EndpointState, Endpoint,
  LoadBalanceStrategy, RouteKey, DispatchStrategy, DispatchConfig, DispatcherStats,
  RoutingError, DispatchError, ConnectionGuard, RoutingEntry, LoadBalancer, RoutingTable
- util/resource.rs: 23 tests covering PoolConfig, SymbolBuffer, PoolStats, PoolExhausted,
  ResourceLimits, ResourceUsage, ResourceRequest, ResourceKind, ResourceExhausted,
  SymbolPool, ResourceTracker
- trace/event_structure.rs: 10 tests covering EventId, Event, OwnerKey, TracePoset,
  EventStructure
- observability/obligation_tracker.rs: 9 tests covering ObligationTrackerConfig,
  ObligationStateInfo, ObligationSummary, TypeSummary, ObligationInfo

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
